$Comment: The anvil's Enhance action stat pool (design section 9.5). Global (non-per-skill) weapon-adjacent stats, matching the MMO's own ItemEnhanceRoll weapon-pool ranges exactly (MMO_CritChance/MMO_CritMultiplier/MMO_Lifesteal/MMO_CooldownReduction from reward.MmoStats, MMO_Luck/MMO_BonusXp global ids) so a hand-rolled /mmoitemenhance and an anvil-enhanced weapon read the same stat vocabulary.
